children.name: shows error when add source fails with 502
shows Download button when not downloaded and has_sources

closes browse modal when X button clicked
calls onCancelDownload when Queued button clicked

sorts by status order (pending before done)
renders img when cover_url is set
shows download progress bar and % when downloading with pages
returns null when availableTypes is empty
calls onChange with the content type value when a pill is clicked
shows "All" and only types in availableTypes
renders skeleton pulse when cover_url is null
shows read progress bar when started but not completed
calls onChange false when currently true
opens browse modal when Browse plugins button clicked
hides download progress bar when pages_total is 0

polls every 2s when a manga is syncing
renders manga title and chapter number
shows Prev Ch. / Next Ch. buttons
shows remove button for non-downloading items
submit triggers searchManga with current query
at last page with next chapter — Next becomes "Next Ch." and navigates
calls api.login and setToken on successful submit
at last page with no next chapter — Next disabled
does not show progress bar when status is pending
shows progress bar and percentage when downloading with pages
starts with empty fields and no error
navigates to library after handleAdd succeeds
prev button disabled on page 0, enabled otherwise
sets removingId during removal then clears it

fetches on mount and sets data
calls onRemove when button is clicked
at first page with prev chapter — Prev becomes "Prev Ch." and navigates
both disabled when no adjacent chapters

falls back to 16 for invalid stored value

stops cover poll once all items have a cover_url

uses /api/ cover_url directly without falling back to coverUrl
calls onApply with selected size and closes popover
apply updates state and persists to localStorage
shows "No entries." when log buffer is empty
calls setLogLevel when capture level button clicked
does not poll while trendingLoading is true
filter hides entries below selected level
calls onRemove(true) from "Remove + delete files" confirm
does not call onChange when clicking active option
falls back to api.coverUrl when cover_url is null

renders log entries in the table
defaults to library tab for admins
